chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7076 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 33820/2018 2. For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 Mr. Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Azad Khan, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Fahad Hussain, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Per learned counsel, show cause notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
